questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要將大型 Web 應用程式重新架構為無伺服器微服務架構。該應用程式使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體並用 Python 編寫。該公司選擇了 Web 應用程式的一個元件作為微服務進行測試。該組件每秒支援數百個請求。該公司希望在支援 Python 的 AWS 解決方案上建立和測試微服務。該解決方案還必須自動擴展，並且需要最少的基礎設施和最少的營運支援。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to rearchitect a large-scale web application to a serverless microservices architecture. The application uses Amazon EC2 instances and is written in Python. The company selected one component of the web application to test as a microservice. The component supports hundreds of requests each second. The company wants to create and test the microservice on an AWS solution that supports Python. The solution must also scale automatically and require minimal infrastructure and minimal operational support. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Spot 佇列來自動擴展執行最新 Amazon Linux 作業系統的 EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Use a Spot Fleet with auto scaling of EC2 instances that run the most recent Amazon Linux operating system.

B.zh: 使用配置了高可用性的 AWS Elastic Beanstalk Web 伺服器環境。
B.en: Use an AWS Elastic Beanstalk web server environment that has high availability configured.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)。啟動自我管理的 EC2 執行個體的 Auto Scaling 群組。
C.en: Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). Launch Auto Scaling groups of self-managed EC2 instances.

D.zh: 使用執行自訂開發程式碼的 AWS Lambda 函數。
D.en: Use an AWS Lambda function that runs custom developed code.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用執行最新 Amazon Linux 作業系統的 EC2 執行個體 Spot 佇列，並啟用自動擴充。錯誤：雖然Spot Fleet可以提供成本優化的運算資源並支援自動擴展，但仍需要管理EC2實例的作業系統、應用程式部署和擴展策略，無法滿足「最小化基礎設施和營運支援」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Use Spot Fleet of EC2 instances running the latest Amazon Linux operating system, with autoscaling enabled. Error: Although Spot Fleet can provide cost-optimized computing resources and support automatic expansion, it still needs to manage the operating system, application deployment and expansion strategy of EC2 instances, and cannot meet the requirement of "minimized infrastructure and operational support".

B.zh: 錯誤。使用配置為高可用性的 AWS Elastic Beanstalk Web 伺服器環境。錯誤：儘管 Elastic Beanstalk 簡化了應用程式部署和管理，但它仍然在 EC2 執行個體上運行並涉及某些基礎設施管理。與AWS Lambda相比，其Serverless特性不夠突出，無法完全滿足「最小化基礎設施和營運支援」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Use an AWS Elastic Beanstalk web server environment configured for high availability. Error: Although Elastic Beanstalk simplifies application deployment and management, it still runs on EC2 instances and involves certain infrastructure management. Compared with AWS Lambda, its serverless features are not outstanding enough and cannot fully meet the requirements of "minimized infrastructure and operational support".

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)。啟動一個由自我管理的 EC2 執行個體組成的 Auto Scaling 群組。錯誤：Amazon EKS 是功能強大的容器編排服務，但它需要管理 Kubernetes 叢集和 EC2 執行個體。營運複雜度高，不符合「最小化基礎設施和營運支援」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). Start an Auto Scaling group of self-managed EC2 instances. Error: Amazon EKS is a powerful container orchestration service, but it requires management of Kubernetes clusters and EC2 instances. The operational complexity is high, and it does not meet the requirements of "minimized infrastructure and operational support".

D.zh: 正確。AWS Lambda 是一種完全無伺服器運算服務，支援執行 Python 程式碼，並且可以自動擴展以處理高並發請求。無需管理底層基礎設施，完全滿足「最小化基礎設施和營運支援」的要求。
D.en: Correct. AWS Lambda is a completely serverless computing service that supports running Python code and can automatically scale to handle high concurrent requests. It does not need to manage the underlying infrastructure and fully meets the requirements of "minimized infrastructure and operational support".

answer_text.zh: D. 使用執行自訂開發程式碼的 AWS Lambda 函數。
answer_text.en: D. Use an AWS Lambda function that runs custom developed code.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (87%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Lambda 是一種完全無伺服器運算服務，支援執行 Python 程式碼，並且可以自動擴展以處理高並發請求。無需管理底層基礎設施，完全滿足「最小化基礎設施和營運支援」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (87%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Lambda is a completely serverless computing service that supports running Python code and can automatically scale to handle high concurrent requests. It does not need to manage the underlying infrastructure and fully meets the requirements of "minimized infrastructure and operational support".

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 本公司擁有從其本地位置到 AWS 帳戶的 AWS Direct Connect 連線。該 AWS 帳戶在同一 AWS 區域中有 30 個不同的 VPC。 VPC 使用私有虛擬介面 (VIF)。每個VPC都有一個CIDR區塊，不與公司控制下的其他網路重疊。該公司希望集中管理網路架構，同時仍允許每個 VPC 與所有其他 VPC 和本地網路進行通訊。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an AWS Direct Connect connection from its on-premises location to an AWS account. The AWS account has 30 different VPCs in the same AWS Region. The VPCs use private virtual interfaces (VIFs). Each VPC has a CIDR block that does not overlap with other networks under the company's control. The company wants to centrally manage the networking architecture while still allowing each VPC to communicate with all other VPCs and on-premises networks. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?

A.zh: 建立中轉網關，並將 Direct Connect 連線與新的中轉 VIF 關聯。開啟中轉網關的路由傳播功能。
A.en: Create a transit gateway, and associate the Direct Connect connection with a new transit VIF. Turn on the transit gateway's route propagation feature.

B.zh: 建立 Direct Connect 閘道。重新建立專用 VIF 以使用新網關。透過建立新的虛擬專用網關來關聯每個 VPC。
B.en: Create a Direct Connect gateway. Recreate the private VIFs to use the new gateway. Associate each VPC by creating new virtual private gateways.

C.zh: 建立中轉 VP 將 Direct Connect 連線連接到中轉 VP 在區域中的所有其他 VPC 之間建立對等連線。 Update the route tables.
C.en: Create a transit VPConnect the Direct Connect connection to the transit VPCreate a peering connection between all other VPCs in the Region. Update the route tables.

D.zh: 建立從本地到每個 VPC 的 AWS Site-to-Site VPN 連線。確保每個連線的兩個 VPN 隧道均已開啟。開啟路由傳播功能。
D.en: Create AWS Site-to-Site VPN connections from on premises to each VPC. Ensure that both VPN tunnels are UP for each connection. Turn on the route propagation feature.

A.zh: 正確。Transit Gateway 支援伺服器架構的集中管理，並允許多個 VPC 和本機伺服器透過 Direct Connect 進行通訊。正確：使用 Transit VIF 將 Direct Connect 連接到 Transit Gateway 以改善道路資產管理。正確：啟用道路屬性傳播功能後，道路屬性表會自動更新，減少手動設定的操作開銷。
A.en: Correct. Transit Gateway supports centralized management of the server architecture and allows multiple VPCs and local servers to communicate through Direct Connect. Correct: Use Transit VIF to connect Direct Connect to Transit Gateway to improve road property management. Correct: After enabling the road property propagation function, the road property table will be automatically updated, reducing the operational overhead of manual configuration.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然專線網關可以連接多個VPC，但需要為每個VPC建立一個新的虛擬專用網關，這增加了營運開銷。錯誤：重新建立私有VIF將導致額外的配置工作，並且不滿足「最小化操作開銷」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Although Direct Connect Gateway can connect multiple VPCs, it needs to create a new Virtual Private Gateway for each VPC, which increases operational overhead. Error: Recreating Private VIFs will cause additional configuration work and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing operational overhead".

C.zh: 錯誤。Transit VPC 是一種過時的設計模式，AWS 建議使用 Transit Gateway 作為替代方案。 Bug：建立多個 VPC 對等連線並手動更新路由表會增加營運開銷。
C.en: Incorrect. Transit VPC is an outdated design pattern, and AWS recommends Transit Gateway as an alternative. Bug: Creating multiple VPC peering connections and manually updating the routing table increases operational overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。為每個 VPC 建立 VPN 連線會導致大量的設定工作和營運開銷。錯誤：VPN連線的效能通常低於Direct Connect，不適合對效能要求較高的場景。
D.en: Incorrect. Creating VPN connections for each VPC results in significant configuration effort and operational overhead. Error: The performance of VPN connections is usually lower than Direct Connect and is not suitable for scenarios that require high performance.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立中轉網關，並將 Direct Connect 連線與新的中轉 VIF 關聯。開啟中轉網關的路由傳播功能。
answer_text.en: A. Create a transit gateway, and associate the Direct Connect connection with a new transit VIF. Turn on the transit gateway's route propagation feature.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Transit Gateway 支援伺服器架構的集中管理，並允許多個 VPC 和本機伺服器透過 Direct Connect 進行通訊。正確：使用 Transit VIF 將 Direct Connect 連接到 Transit Gateway 以改善道路資產管理。正確：啟用道路屬性傳播功能後，道路屬性表會自動更新，減少手動設定的操作開銷。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Transit Gateway supports centralized management of the server architecture and allows multiple VPCs and local servers to communicate through Direct Connect. Correct: Use Transit VIF to connect Direct Connect to Transit Gateway to improve road property management. Correct: After enabling the road property propagation function, the road property table will be automatically updated, reducing the operational overhead of manual configuration.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式。 EC2 執行個體使用具有關聯原則的 IAM 角色連線到 Amazon RDS 資料庫。該公司希望使用 AWS Systems Manager 修補 EC2 執行個體而不中斷正在執行的應用程式。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has applications that run on Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances connect to Amazon RDS databases by using an IAM role that has associated policies. The company wants to use AWS Systems Manager to patch the EC2 instances without disrupting the running applications. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立新的 IAM 角色。將 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 策略附加到新的 IAM 角色。將新的 IAM 角色附加到 EC2 執行個體和現有 IAM 角色。
A.en: Create a new IAM role. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the new IAM role. Attach the new IAM role to the EC2 instances and the existing IAM role.

B.zh: 建立 IAM 使用者。將 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 政策附加到 IAM 使用者。設定 Systems Manager 以使用 IAM 使用者來管理 EC2 執行個體。
B.en: Create an IAM user. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the IAM user. Configure Systems Manager to use the IAM user to manage the EC2 instances.

C.zh: Enable Default Host Configuration Management in Systems Manager to manage the EC2 instances.
C.en: Enable Default Host Configuration Management in Systems Manager to manage the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 從現有 IAM 角色中刪除現有策略。將 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 策略新增至現有 IAM 角色。
D.en: Remove the existing policies from the existing IAM role. Add the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the existing IAM role.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項錯誤：AWS IAM 角色無法直接附加到另一個 IAM 角色。 IAM 角色是為特定資源或服務設計的，不能組合使用。另外，創建一個新角色並將其附加到現有角色並不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Create a new IAM role. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the new IAM role. Attach the new IAM role to the EC2 instance and the existing IAM role. Error: An AWS IAM role cannot be attached directly to another IAM role. IAM roles are designed for specific resources or services and cannot be used in combination. In addition, creating a new role and attaching it to an existing role does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。建立 IAM 使用者。將 AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore 政策附加到 IAM 使用者。設定 Systems Manager 以使用此 IAM 使用者來管理 EC2 執行個體。錯誤：AWS Systems Manager 需要 IAM 角色來管理 EC2 實例，而不是 IAM 使用者。 IAM 使用者通常用於人類使用者或程式訪問，而不是用於實例管理。
B.en: Incorrect. Create an IAM user. Attach the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the IAM user. Configure Systems Manager to use this IAM user to manage EC2 instances. Error: AWS Systems Manager requires an IAM role to manage EC2 instances, not an IAM user. IAM users are typically used for human user or program access, not for instance management.

C.zh: 正確。啟用預設主機組態管理以管理 EC2 執行個體。正確：AWS Systems Manager 提供預設主機組態管理功能來自動管理 EC2 實例，包括修補程式管理。啟用此功能即可滿足題目要求。
C.en: Correct. Enable default host configuration management to manage EC2 instances. Correct: AWS Systems Manager provides default host configuration management capabilities to automatically manage EC2 instances, including patch management. Enabling this function can meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項錯誤：刪除現有策略可能會阻止 EC2 執行個體存取 RDS 資料庫，從而中斷應用程式操作。這與「不影響正在運行的應用程式」的問題要求相矛盾。
D.en: Incorrect. Remove existing policies from existing IAM roles. Add the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore policy to the existing IAM role. Error: Removing an existing policy may prevent the EC2 instance from accessing the RDS database, interrupting application operation. This contradicts the question requirement of "not affecting running applications".

answer_text.zh: C. Enable Default Host Configuration Management in Systems Manager to manage the EC2 instances.
answer_text.en: C. Enable Default Host Configuration Management in Systems Manager to manage the EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (80%)； A (20%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：啟用預設主機組態管理以管理 EC2 執行個體。正確：AWS Systems Manager 提供預設主機組態管理功能來自動管理 EC2 實例，包括修補程式管理。啟用此功能即可滿足題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (80%); A (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Enable default host configuration management to manage EC2 instances. Correct: AWS Systems Manager provides default host configuration management capabilities to automatically manage EC2 instances, including patch management. Enabling this function can meet the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 和 Kubernetes Horizo​​ntal Pod Autoscaler 運行容器應用程式。全天的工作量並不一致。解決方案架構師注意到，當現有節點達到叢集中的最大容量時，節點數量不會自動擴展，這會導致效能問題。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的管理開銷解決此問題？
question_text.en: A company runs container applications by using Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) and the Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler. The workload is not consistent throughout the day. A solutions architect notices that the number of nodes does not automatically scale out when the existing nodes have reached maximum capacity in the cluster, which causes performance issues. Which solution will resolve this issue with the LEAST administrative overhead?

A.zh: 透過追蹤記憶體使用情況來擴展節點。
A.en: Scale out the nodes by tracking the memory usage.

B.zh: Use the Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler to manage the number of nodes in the cluster.
B.en: Use the Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler to manage the number of nodes in the cluster.

C.zh: Use an AWS Lambda function to resize the EKS cluster automatically.
C.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to resize the EKS cluster automatically.

D.zh: Use an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group to distribute the workload.
D.en: Use an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group to distribute the workload.

A.zh: 錯誤。追蹤記憶體使用情況和手動擴展節點需要額外的監視和管理工作，從而增加管理開銷。此方法欄不符合問題的「最小開銷」要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Tracking memory usage and manually scaling nodes requires additional monitoring and management effort, increasing management overhead. The this approach bar does not meet the "minimum overhead" requirement of the question.

B.zh: 正確。Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler 是一款專門設計用於根據叢集的資源需求自動調整節點數量的工具。它與Amazon EKS整合良好，可在節點資源不足時自動擴展節點，減少管理開銷。
B.en: Correct. The Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler is a tool specifically designed to automatically adjust the number of nodes based on the resource needs of the cluster. It integrates well with Amazon EKS and can automatically expand nodes when node resources are insufficient, reducing management overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Lambda 函數需要額外的開發和維護工作。雖然可以實現自動伸縮，但其管理開銷比 Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler 更高。
C.en: Incorrect. Using AWS Lambda functions requires additional development and maintenance effort. Although automatic scaling can be implemented, it has higher management overhead than Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler.

D.zh: 錯誤。直接管理 EC2 Auto Scaling 群組不了解 Kubernetes 待處理 pod 或協調 EKS 節點容量； Cluster Autoscaler 以更少的管理提供所需的整合。
D.en: Incorrect. Managing an EC2 Auto Scaling group directly does not understand Kubernetes pending pods or coordinate EKS node capacity; Cluster Autoscaler provides the required integration with less administration.

answer_text.zh: B. Use the Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler to manage the number of nodes in the cluster.
answer_text.en: B. Use the Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler to manage the number of nodes in the cluster.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler 是一款專門設計用於根據叢集的資源需求自動調整節點數量的工具。它與Amazon EKS整合良好，可在節點資源不足時自動擴展節點，減少管理開銷。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Kubernetes Cluster Autoscaler is a tool specifically designed to automatically adjust the number of nodes based on the resource needs of the cluster. It integrates well with Amazon EKS and can automatically expand nodes when node resources are insufficient, reducing management overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司每月在 Amazon S3 標準儲存中維護約 300 TB。每個 S3 物件的大小通常約為 50 GB，並且經常被其全域應用程式替換為分段上傳。 S3物件的數量和大小保持不變，但該公司的S3儲存成本每個月都在增加。在這種情況下，解決方案架構師應該如何降低成本？
question_text.en: A company maintains about 300 TB in Amazon S3 Standard storage month after month. The S3 objects are each typically around 50 GB in size and are frequently replaced with multipart uploads by their global application. The number and size of S3 objects remain constant, but the company's S3 storage costs are increasing each month. How should a solutions architect reduce costs in this situation?

A.zh: Switch from multipart uploads to Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration.
A.en: Switch from multipart uploads to Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration.

B.zh: 啟用刪除不完整分段上傳的 S3 生命週期原則。
B.en: Enable an S3 Lifecycle policy that deletes incomplete multipart uploads.

C.zh: Configure S3 inventory to prevent objects from being archived too quickly.
C.en: Configure S3 inventory to prevent objects from being archived too quickly.

D.zh: Configure Amazon CloudFront to reduce the number of objects stored in Amazon S3.
D.en: Configure Amazon CloudFront to reduce the number of objects stored in Amazon S3.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 傳輸加速用於加速跨區域或全球上傳，而不考慮降低儲存成本。這個選項毫無疑問地解決了儲存成本增加的問題。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration is used to speed up uploads across regions or globally, regardless of reducing storage costs. this option is barless to solve the problem of increased storage costs.

B.zh: 正確。未完成的桶上傳會佔用儲存空間並增加儲存成本。啟用生命週期策略可以自動刪除這些不完整的儲存桶上傳，從而減少不必要的儲存成本。此選項直接解決問題的根本原因。
B.en: Correct. Unfinished bucket uploads will occupy storage space and increase storage costs. Enabling lifecycle policies can automatically delete these incomplete bucket uploads, thereby reducing unnecessary storage costs. this option directly addresses the root cause of the problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。S3清單用於產生儲存物件列表，與反安全物件的返回無關。此選項與問題中所述的儲存成本增加問題無關。
C.en: Incorrect. S3 inventory is used to generate lists of storage objects and has nothing to do with the return of anti-security objects. this option has nothing to do with the increased storage cost issue described in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudFront 是一項內容分發服務，用於加速內容交付，與降低 S3 儲存成本密切相關。這個選項毫無疑問地解決了儲存成本增加的問題。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon CloudFront is a content distribution service that is used to accelerate content delivery and is closely related to reducing S3 storage costs. this option is barless to solve the problem of increased storage costs.

answer_text.zh: B. 啟用刪除不完整分段上傳的 S3 生命週期原則。
answer_text.en: B. Enable an S3 Lifecycle policy that deletes incomplete multipart uploads.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：未完成的桶上傳會佔用儲存空間並增加儲存成本。啟用生命週期策略可以自動刪除這些不完整的儲存桶上傳，從而減少不必要的儲存成本。此選項直接解決問題的根本原因。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Unfinished bucket uploads will occupy storage space and increase storage costs. Enabling lifecycle policies can automatically delete these incomplete bucket uploads, thereby reducing unnecessary storage costs. this option directly addresses the root cause of the problem.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司為行動裝置部署了一款多人遊戲。遊戲需要根據緯度和經度對玩家進行即時位置追蹤。遊戲的資料儲存必須支援快速更新和位置檢索。遊戲使用具有唯讀副本的 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL 資料庫實例來儲存位置資料。在使用高峰期，資料庫無法維持讀寫更新所需的效能。該遊戲的用戶群正在迅速成長。解決方案架構師應該如何提高資料層的效能？
question_text.en: A company has deployed a multiplayer game for mobile devices. The game requires live location tracking of players based on latitude and longitude. The data store for the game must support rapid updates and retrieval of locations. The game uses an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance with read replicas to store the location data. During peak usage periods, the database is unable to maintain the performance that is needed for reading and writing updates. The game's user base is increasing rapidly. What should a solutions architect do to improve the performance of the data tier?

A.zh: Take a snapshot of the existing DB instance.恢復啟用多可用區的快照。
A.en: Take a snapshot of the existing DB instance. Restore the snapshot with Multi-AZ enabled.

B.zh: Migrate from Amazon RDS to Amazon OpenSearch Service with OpenSearch Dashboards.
B.en: Migrate from Amazon RDS to Amazon OpenSearch Service with OpenSearch Dashboards.

C.zh: 在現有資料庫執行個體前面部署 Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX)。修改遊戲以使用 DAX。
C.en: Deploy Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) in front of the existing DB instance. Modify the game to use DAX.

D.zh: 在現有資料庫執行個體前面部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。修改遊戲以使用Redis。
D.en: Deploy an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster in front of the existing DB instance. Modify the game to use Redis.

A.zh: 錯誤。多可用區部署主要用於提高資料庫可用性和容錯能力，而不是效能最佳化。啟用多可用區並不能解決讀寫效能瓶頸。
A.en: Incorrect. Multi-AZ deployment is mainly used to improve database availability and fault tolerance, rather than performance optimization. Enabling Multi-AZ will not solve the read and write performance bottleneck.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon OpenSearch Service 主要用於搜尋和分析場景，而不是即時讀寫頻繁更新的資料儲存。此選項不適合解決遊戲即時位置更新的效能問題，因此會出現錯誤。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon OpenSearch Service is mainly used for search and analysis scenarios, rather than real-time reading and writing of frequently updated data storage. This option is not suitable for solving performance issues with the game's live location updates, hence the error.

C.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 是加速 Amazon DynamoDB 查詢的快取服務。本題使用的是Amazon RDS，而不是DynamoDB，因此DAX無法直接應用於現有架構。
C.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) is a caching service used to accelerate Amazon DynamoDB queries. Amazon RDS is used in this question, not DynamoDB, so DAX cannot be directly applied to the existing architecture.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 是高效能快取解決方案，適合處理高頻讀寫場景。透過將Redis部署在資料庫前端，可以顯著降低資料庫的讀寫壓力，提高效能。這個選項是正確的。
D.en: Correct. Amazon ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance caching solution suitable for handling high-frequency read and write scenarios. By deploying Redis in front of the database, the read and write pressure on the database can be significantly reduced and performance improved. This option is correct.

answer_text.zh: D. 在現有資料庫執行個體前面部署 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。修改遊戲以使用Redis。
answer_text.en: D. Deploy an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster in front of the existing DB instance. Modify the game to use Redis.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (74%)； C (26%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 是高效能快取解決方案，適合處理高頻讀寫場景。透過將Redis部署在資料庫前端，可以顯著降低資料庫的讀寫壓力，提高效能。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (74%); C (26%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance caching solution suitable for handling high-frequency read and write scenarios. By deploying Redis in front of the database, the read and write pressure on the database can be significantly reduced and performance improved. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將關鍵資料儲存在該公司 AWS 帳戶的 Amazon DynamoDB 表中。 IT 管理員意外刪除了 DynamoDB 表。此次刪除造成了重大資料遺失並擾亂了公司的營運。該公司希望在未來防止此類破壞。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這項要求？
question_text.en: A company stores critical data in Amazon DynamoDB tables in the company's AWS account. An IT administrator accidentally deleted a DynamoDB table. The deletion caused a significant loss of data and disrupted the company's operations. The company wants to prevent this type of disruption in the future. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在 AWS CloudTrail 中設定追蹤。 Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for delete actions. Create an AWS Lambda function to automatically restore deleted DynamoDB tables.
A.en: Configure a trail in AWS CloudTrail. Create an Amazon EventBridge rule for delete actions. Create an AWS Lambda function to automatically restore deleted DynamoDB tables.

B.zh: Create a backup and restore plan for the DynamoDB tables.手動還原 DynamoDB 表。
B.en: Create a backup and restore plan for the DynamoDB tables. Recover the DynamoDB tables manually.

C.zh: 在 DynamoDB 表上設定刪除保護。
C.en: Configure deletion protection on the DynamoDB tables.

D.zh: 在 DynamoDB 表上啟用時間點復原。
D.en: Enable point-in-time recovery on the DynamoDB tables.

A.zh: 錯誤。設定 AWS CloudTrail、EventBridge 規則和 Lambda 函數以進行自動復原：可自動偵測刪除操作並嘗試復原。需要額外的配置和開發工作，這增加了操作複雜性和維護成本。討論：雖然可以達成目標，但是運行開銷較高，不符合「LEAST運行開銷」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Configure AWS CloudTrail, EventBridge rules, and Lambda functions for automatic recovery: Can automatically detect deletion operations and attempt recovery. Additional configuration and development work is required, which increases operational complexity and maintenance costs. Discussion: Although the goal can be achieved, the operational overhead is high and does not meet the requirements of "LEAST operational overhead".

B.zh: 錯誤。建立備份和復原計劃，手動還原：備份可保護資料免於遺失。缺點：恢復需要手動操作，這可能會導致延遲和人為錯誤。討論：手動恢復會增加操作開銷，並且不是最佳解決方案。
B.en: Incorrect. Create a backup and recovery plan, manual recovery: Backups protect data from loss. Disadvantage: Recovery requires manual operations, which can lead to delays and human error. Discussion: Manual recovery increases operational overhead and is not the optimal solution.

C.zh: 正確。設定刪除保護：刪除保護是DynamoDB的內建功能，可以直接防止表格被意外刪除。傷口點：沒有連接的傷口點的運作成本最低。討論：它滿足「最少的營運開銷」的要求，是最好的解決方案。
C.en: Correct. Configure deletion protection: Deletion protection is a built-in feature of DynamoDB that can directly prevent tables from being accidentally deleted. Wound spots: Wound spots without connections have the lowest operating cost. Discussion: It meets the requirements of "LEAST operational overhead" and is the best solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。啟用時間點復原：您可以還原到指定時間點，防止資料遺失。缺點：無法防止表被刪除，仍需要手動恢復。雖然它可以保護數據，但無法防止刪除，並不是最好的解決方案。
D.en: Incorrect. Enable point-in-time recovery: You can restore to a specified point in time, protecting data from loss. Disadvantage: Unable to prevent the table from being deleted and still need to be restored manually. Although it can protect data, it cannot prevent deletion and is not the best solution.

answer_text.zh: C. 在 DynamoDB 表上設定刪除保護。
answer_text.en: C. Configure deletion protection on the DynamoDB tables.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：設定刪除保護：刪除保護是DynamoDB的內建功能，可以直接防止表格被意外刪除。傷口點：沒有連接的傷口點的運作成本最低。討論：它滿足「最少的營運開銷」的要求，是最好的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure deletion protection: Deletion protection is a built-in feature of DynamoDB that can directly prevent tables from being accidentally deleted. Wound spots: Wound spots without connections have the lowest operating cost. Discussion: It meets the requirements of "LEAST operational overhead" and is the best solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司的本地資料中心儲存容量不足。該公司希望將其儲存基礎設施遷移到 AWS，同時最大限度地降低頻寬成本。該解決方案必須允許立即檢索資料而無需額外費用。如何滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an on-premises data center that is running out of storage capacity. The company wants to migrate its storage infrastructure to AWS while minimizing bandwidth costs. The solution must allow for immediate retrieval of data at no additional cost. How can these requirements be met?

A.zh: Deploy Amazon S3 Glacier Vault and enable expedited retrieval. Enable provisioned retrieval capacity for the workload.
A.en: Deploy Amazon S3 Glacier Vault and enable expedited retrieval. Enable provisioned retrieval capacity for the workload.

B.zh: Deploy AWS Storage Gateway using cached volumes. Use Storage Gateway to store data in Amazon S3 while retaining copies of frequently accessed data subsets locally.
B.en: Deploy AWS Storage Gateway using cached volumes. Use Storage Gateway to store data in Amazon S3 while retaining copies of frequently accessed data subsets locally.

C.zh: 使用儲存磁碟區部署 AWS Storage Gateway 在本機上儲存資料。使用 Storage Gateway 將資料的時間點快照非同步備份到 Amazon S3。
C.en: Deploy AWS Storage Gateway using stored volumes to store data locally. Use Storage Gateway to asynchronously back up point-in-time snapshots of the data to Amazon S3.

D.zh: 部署 AWS Direct Connect 以連接本機資料中心。配置 AWS Storage Gateway 以在本機上儲存資料。使用 Storage Gateway 將資料的時間點快照非同步備份到 Amazon S3。
D.en: Deploy AWS Direct Connect to connect with the on-premises data center. Configure AWS Storage Gateway to store data locally. Use Storage Gateway to asynchronously back up point-in-time snapshots of the data to Amazon S3.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 Glacier 主要用於資料的長期儲存和歸檔。檢索數據需要額外付費，增量檢索不符合「立即檢索數據，無需額外付費」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 Glacier is mainly used for long-term storage and archiving of data. Retrieving data requires additional fees, and incremental retrieval does not meet the requirement of "immediate retrieval of data without additional fees".

B.zh: 正確。AWS Storage Gateway 的快取磁碟區模型允許將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中，同時在本機保留經常存取的資料子集。這種方式可以減少時間佔用，滿足「立即檢索數據，無需額外費用」的要求。
B.en: Correct. AWS Storage Gateway's cache volume model allows data to be stored in Amazon S3 while retaining frequently accessed subsets of the data locally. This approach can reduce time usage and meet the requirement of "immediate retrieval of data at no additional cost".

C.zh: 錯誤。儲存卷模型主要將資料儲存在本地並非同步備份到Amazon S3。這種方法無法有效減輕本地儲存的壓力，也不符合「儲存基礎架構遷移到AWS」問題的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. The storage volume model mainly stores data locally and backs it up asynchronously to Amazon S3. This method cannot effectively reduce the pressure on local storage, and it does not meet the requirements of the question "migrating storage infrastructure to AWS".

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Direct Connect主要用於建立專線連線以最佳化網路效能，但問題並未提及是否需要專線連線。另外，將資料儲存在本地並非同步備份到Amazon S3的方法不符合「將儲存基礎設施遷移到AWS」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Direct Connect is mainly used to establish dedicated line connections to optimize network performance, but the question does not mention the need for dedicated line connections. Additionally, methods that store data locally and back it up asynchronously to Amazon S3 do not meet the requirements for "migrating storage infrastructure to AWS.".

answer_text.zh: B. Deploy AWS Storage Gateway using cached volumes. Use Storage Gateway to store data in Amazon S3 while retaining copies of frequently accessed data subsets locally.
answer_text.en: B. Deploy AWS Storage Gateway using cached volumes. Use Storage Gateway to store data in Amazon S3 while retaining copies of frequently accessed data subsets locally.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (60%)； C (40%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Storage Gateway 的快取磁碟區模型允許將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中，同時在本機保留經常存取的資料子集。這種方式可以減少時間佔用，滿足「立即檢索數據，無需額外費用」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (60%); C (40%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Storage Gateway's cache volume model allows data to be stored in Amazon S3 while retaining frequently accessed subsets of the data locally. This approach can reduce time usage and meet the requirement of "immediate retrieval of data at no additional cost".

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在跨多個可用區的 VPC 中運行三層 Web 應用程式。 Amazon EC2 執行個體在應用程式層的 Auto Scaling 群組中執行。公司需要製定一個自動擴展計劃來分析每個資源的每日和每週歷史工作負載趨勢。配置必須根據利用率的預測和即時變化適當地擴展資源。解決方案架構師應該推薦哪種擴充策略來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a three-tier web application in a VPC across multiple Availability Zones. Amazon EC2 instances run in an Auto Scaling group for the application tier. The company needs to make an automated scaling plan that will analyze each resource's daily and weekly historical workload trends. The configuration must scale resources appropriately according to both the forecast and live changes in utilization. Which scaling strategy should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 根據 EC2 執行個體的平均 CPU 使用率實現逐步擴展的動態擴展。
A.en: Implement dynamic scaling with step scaling based on average CPU utilization from the EC2 instances.

B.zh: 啟用預測縮放以進行預測和縮放。配置具有目標追蹤的動態縮放
B.en: Enable predictive scaling to forecast and scale. Configure dynamic scaling with target tracking

C.zh: 根據 Web 應用程式的流量模式建立自動規劃的擴充操作。
C.en: Create an automated scheduled scaling action based on the traffic patterns of the web application.

D.zh: 設定簡單的擴充策略。根據EC2實例啟動時間增加冷卻時間。
D.en: Set up a simple scaling policy. Increase the cooldown period based on the EC2 instance startup time.

A.zh: 錯誤。動態擴展和步進擴展可以根據即時指標（例如CPU利用率）調整資源，但它們不會分析歷史工作負載趨勢或預測未來需求。因為，這個選項不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Dynamic scaling and step scaling can adjust resources based on real-time metrics (such as CPU utilization), but they do not analyze historical workload trends or predict future needs. Because, this option does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。預測式擴展可以分析資源的歷史工作負載趨勢並預測未來的需求，動態擴展中的目標追蹤可以根據即時指標調整資源。這個選項完全符合題目的要求，可以同時滿足預測和即時擴展的需求。
B.en: Correct. Predictive scaling can analyze historical workload trends of resources and predict future needs, and target tracking in dynamic scaling can adjust resources based on real-time metrics. This option fully meets the requirements of the question and can meet the needs of both prediction and real-time expansion.

C.zh: 錯誤。規劃擴展根據預先定義的計劃調整資源，但不會根據即時變化或預測的未來需求進行調整。該選項不符合題目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Planning scaling adjusts resources based on a predefined schedule, but it does not adjust based on real-time changes or forecasted future needs. This option does not meet the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。簡單的擴展策略是一個基本的擴展條，通常會根據單一指標觸發擴展操作。增加冷卻時間可以避免頻繁擴展，但它不允許您分析歷史趨勢或預測未來需求。該選項不符合題目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. A simple scaling strategy is a basic scaling bar that typically triggers scaling operations based on a single metric. Increasing the cooling time avoids frequent expansion, but it does not allow you to analyze historical trends or predict future needs. This option does not meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 啟用預測縮放以進行預測和縮放。配置具有目標追蹤的動態縮放
answer_text.en: B. Enable predictive scaling to forecast and scale. Configure dynamic scaling with target tracking

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：預測式擴展可以分析資源的歷史工作負載趨勢並預測未來的需求，動態擴展中的目標追蹤可以根據即時指標調整資源。這個選項完全符合題目的要求，可以同時滿足預測和即時擴展的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Predictive scaling can analyze historical workload trends of resources and predict future needs, and target tracking in dynamic scaling can adjust resources based on real-time metrics. This option fully meets the requirements of the question and can meet the needs of both prediction and real-time expansion.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家包裹遞送公司有一個使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體和 Amazon Aurora MySQL 資料庫叢集的應用程式。隨著應用程式變得越來越流行，EC2 執行個體的使用量僅略有增加。資料庫叢集使用率以更快的速度成長。該公司添加了唯讀副本，從而在短時間內減少了資料庫叢集的使用率。然而，負荷仍在持續增加。導致DB叢集使用率增加的操作都是與投遞細節相關的重複讀取語句。公司需要減輕重複讀取對資料庫叢集的影響。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A package delivery company has an application that uses Amazon EC2 instances and an Amazon Aurora MySQL DB cluster. As the application becomes more popular, EC2 instance usage increases only slightly. DB cluster usage increases at a much faster rate. The company adds a read replica, which reduces the DB cluster usage for a short period of time. However, the load continues to increase. The operations that cause the increase in DB cluster usage are all repeated read statements that are related to delivery details. The company needs to alleviate the effect of repeated reads on the DB cluster. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 在應用程式和資料庫叢集之間實作 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。
A.en: Implement an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster between the application and the DB cluster.

B.zh: 將額外的唯讀副本新增至資料庫叢集。
B.en: Add an additional read replica to the DB cluster.

C.zh: 為 Aurora 只讀副本配置 Aurora Auto Scaling。
C.en: Configure Aurora Auto Scaling for the Aurora read replicas.

D.zh: 修改資料庫叢集以具有多個寫入器實例。
D.en: Modify the DB cluster to have multiple writer instances.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 是一種高效能記憶體快取服務，可大幅減少資料庫的重複讀取負載。成本效益：快取服務往往比新增資料庫資源更具成本效益，尤其是對於重複的讀取操作。適用場景：問題明確指出資料庫負載主要來自重複的讀取操作，因此使用快取是最合適的解決方案。
A.en: Correct. Amazon ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance memory cache service that can significantly reduce the repeated read load of the database. Cost-effectiveness: Caching services are often more cost-effective than adding database resources, especially for repeated read operations. Applicable scenarios: The question clearly states that the database load mainly comes from repeated read operations, so using cache is the most appropriate solution.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然添加唯讀副本可以分擔讀取負載，但問題中提到了添加只讀副本只能在短期內緩解問題，而stripeless則可以從根本上解決負載持續增加的問題。成本效益：增加唯讀副本會增加資料庫的運作成本，而stripeless可以有效解決重複讀取的問題。
B.en: Incorrect. Although adding read replicas can share the read load, the question has mentioned that adding read replicas can only alleviate the problem in the short term, while stripeless can fundamentally solve the problem of continuous increase in load. Cost-effectiveness: Adding read replicas will increase the operating cost of the database, and stripeless can effectively solve the problem of repeated reads.

C.zh: 錯誤。Aurora Auto Scaling 可以動態調整隻讀副本數量，但這仍然透過增加資料庫資源來解決問題，成本較高。適用場景：彈性伸縮適用於負載波動較大的場景。但問題中的負載不斷增加，主要涉及重複的讀取操作，所以使用cache比較適合。
C.en: Incorrect. Aurora Auto Scaling can dynamically adjust the number of read replicas, but this still solves the problem by increasing database resources, which is costly. Applicable scenarios: Auto Scaling is suitable for scenarios with large load fluctuations. However, the load in the question is continuously increasing and mainly involves repeated read operations, so it is more appropriate to use cache.

D.zh: 錯誤。問題明確指出負載主要來自讀取操作，而不是寫入操作，因此添加不帶條帶的寫入實例可以解決問題。成本效益：多寫實例配置複雜、成本高，不適合目前場景。
D.en: Incorrect. The question clearly states that the load mainly comes from read operations, not write operations, so adding write instances without stripes solves the problem. Cost-effectiveness: The configuration of multi-write instances is complex and costly, and is not suitable for the current scenario.

answer_text.zh: A. 在應用程式和資料庫叢集之間實作 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。
answer_text.en: A. Implement an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster between the application and the DB cluster.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (93%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 是一種高效能記憶體快取服務，可大幅減少資料庫的重複讀取負載。成本效益：快取服務往往比新增資料庫資源更具成本效益，尤其是對於重複的讀取操作。適用場景：問題明確指出資料庫負載主要來自重複的讀取操作，因此使用快取是最合適的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (93%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ElastiCache for Redis is a high-performance memory cache service that can significantly reduce the repeated read load of the database. Cost-effectiveness: Caching services are often more cost-effective than adding database resources, especially for repeated read operations. Applicable scenarios: The question clearly states that the database load mainly comes from repeated read operations, so using cache is the most appropriate solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個使用 Amazon DynamoDB 表進行儲存的應用程式。解決方案架構師發現對錶的許多請求沒有傳回最新資料。該公司的用戶尚未報告任何其他資料庫效能問題。延遲在可接受的範圍內。解決方案架構師應該建議哪種設計變更？
question_text.en: A company has an application that uses an Amazon DynamoDB table for storage. A solutions architect discovers that many requests to the table are not returning the latest data. The company's users have not reported any other issues with database performance. Latency is in an acceptable range. Which design change should the solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: 將唯讀副本新增至表格。
A.en: Add read replicas to the table.

B.zh: 使用全域二級索引 (GSI)。
B.en: Use a global secondary index (GSI).

C.zh: 請求對錶進行強一致性讀取。
C.en: Request strongly consistent reads for the table.

D.zh: 請求表的最終一致讀取。
D.en: Request eventually consistent reads for the table.

A.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB 不支援傳統意義上的唯讀副本。 DynamoDB的讀取一致性是透過配置讀取模式（強一致性或最終一致性）來實現的，而不是透過新增唯讀副本來實現的。此外，DynamoDB的設計中並沒有直接的「唯讀副本」概念，而是透過分片和分區來擴展讀寫效能。
A.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB does not support read replicas in the traditional sense. DynamoDB's read consistency is implemented by configuring the read mode (strong consistency or eventual consistency), rather than by adding read replicas. In addition, there is no direct "read replica" concept in DynamoDB's design, and read and write performance is extended through sharding and partitioning.

B.zh: 錯誤。GSI用於支援不同的查詢模式或存取模式，而不是解決資料一致性問題。這個問題的核心問題是「讀取最新資料」，而不是查詢模式的改變，因為GSI並不是解決問題的精確方法。
B.en: Incorrect. GSI is used to support different query modes or access modes, not to solve data consistency issues. The core issue of this question is "reading the latest data", not the change of query mode, because GSI is not an exact method to solve the problem.

C.zh: 正確。強一致性讀取可確保讀取操作傳回最新數據，即使資料最近已更新。根據問題描述，使用者需要讀取最新的數據，而不是最終一致的數據，因為強一致性讀取才是正確的解決方案。
C.en: Correct. Strongly consistent reads ensure that read operations return the latest data, even if the data was recently updated. According to the problem description, users need to read the latest data, not the final consistent data, because strong consistency reading is the correct solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。最終一致性讀取可能會傳回過時的數據，因為它允許多個副本之間的資料同步延遲。標題明確指出「許多請求沒有返回最新數據」，這說明沒有條帶的最終一致讀取就足夠了。
D.en: Incorrect. Eventually consistent reads may return stale data because it allows delays in data synchronization between multiple replicas. The title clearly states that "many requests do not return the latest data", which shows that eventually consistent reads without stripes are sufficient.

answer_text.zh: C. 請求對錶進行強一致性讀取。
answer_text.en: C. Request strongly consistent reads for the table.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：強一致性讀取可確保讀取操作傳回最新數據，即使資料最近已更新。根據問題描述，使用者需要讀取最新的數據，而不是最終一致的數據，因為強一致性讀取才是正確的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Strongly consistent reads ensure that read operations return the latest data, even if the data was recently updated. According to the problem description, users need to read the latest data, not the final consistent data, because strong consistency reading is the correct solution.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司已使用 Amazon RDS 資料庫在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署其應用程式。該公司使用最小權限原則來配置資料庫存取憑證。該公司的安全團隊希望保護應用程式和資料庫免受 SQL 注入和其他基於 Web 的攻擊。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has deployed its application on Amazon EC2 instances with an Amazon RDS database. The company used the principle of least privilege to configure the database access credentials. The company's security team wants to protect the application and the database from SQL injection and other web-based attacks. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用安全群組和網路 ACL 來保護資料庫和應用程式伺服器。
A.en: Use security groups and network ACLs to secure the database and application servers.

B.zh: 使用 AWS WAF 保護應用程式。使用 RDS 參數組配置安全性設定。
B.en: Use AWS WAF to protect the application. Use RDS parameter groups to configure the security settings.

C.zh: 使用 AWS 網路防火牆來保護應用程式和資料庫。
C.en: Use AWS Network Firewall to protect the application and the database.

D.zh: 在應用程式程式碼中使用不同的資料庫帳戶來實現不同的功能。避免向資料庫使用者授予過多的權限。
D.en: Use different database accounts in the application code for different functions. Avoid granting excessive privileges to the database users.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項安全群組和網路ACL主要用於控制對網路流量的訪問，但它們不能直接防範SQL注入和其他網路攻擊。雖然可以限制流量來源，但它不能提供對應用程式層攻擊的保護。此選項不能滿足問題的要求，且執行開銷較高。錯誤。
A.en: Incorrect. Use security groups and network ACLs to protect databases and application servers. Security groups and network ACLs are primarily used to control access to network traffic, but they cannot directly protect against SQL injection and other web attacks. While it is possible to limit traffic sources, it does not provide protection against application layer attacks. This option cannot meet the requirements of the question, and the operation overhead is high. mistake.

B.zh: 正確。此選項AWS WAF（網路應用防火牆）專門用來防禦SQL注入等Web攻擊，直接滿足了問題的要求。 RDS參數組可以配置資料庫的安全性設置，進一步增強資料庫的安全性。此選項可提供對應用程式層攻擊的保護，且操作開銷較低。正確的。
B.en: Correct. Protect applications using AWS WAF. Configure security settings using RDS parameter groups. AWS WAF (Web Application Firewall) is specially used to defend against SQL injection and other web attacks, which directly meets the requirements of the question. The RDS parameter group can configure the security settings of the database to further enhance the security of the database. This option provides protection against application layer attacks and has low operational overhead. correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS 網路防火牆保護應用程式和資料庫。 AWS網路防火牆主要用於保護網路層流量，無法直接防禦SQL注入等Web攻擊。雖然它可以增強網路安全性，但無法滿足問題所要求的應用層保護。此選項的操作成本較高。錯誤。
C.en: Incorrect. Use AWS Network Firewall to protect applications and databases. AWS Network Firewall is mainly used to protect network layer traffic and cannot directly defend against SQL injection and other web attacks. Although it can enhance network security, it cannot meet the application layer protection required by the question. This option is more expensive to operate. mistake.

D.zh: 錯誤。在應用程式程式碼中為不同的功能使用不同的資料庫帳戶。避免向資料庫使用者授予太多權限。此選項強調資料庫權限管理，但不能直接防範SQL注入和其他Web攻擊。雖然符合「最小權限原則」，但無法滿足問題所要求的應用層保護。此選項的操作成本較高。錯誤。
D.en: Incorrect. Use different database accounts for different functions in your application code. Avoid granting too many permissions to database users. This option emphasizes database permission management, but cannot directly protect against SQL injection and other web attacks. Although it complies with the "principle of least privilege", it cannot meet the application layer protection required by the question. This option is more expensive to operate. mistake.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS WAF 保護應用程式。使用 RDS 參數組配置安全性設定。
answer_text.en: B. Use AWS WAF to protect the application. Use RDS parameter groups to configure the security settings.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項AWS WAF（網路應用防火牆）專門用來防禦SQL注入等Web攻擊，直接滿足了問題的要求。 RDS參數組可以配置資料庫的安全性設置，進一步增強資料庫的安全性。此選項可提供對應用程式層攻擊的保護，且操作開銷較低。正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Protect applications using AWS WAF. Configure security settings using RDS parameter groups. AWS WAF (Web Application Firewall) is specially used to defend against SQL injection and other web attacks, which directly meets the requirements of the question. The RDS parameter group can configure the security settings of the database to further enhance the security of the database. This option provides protection against application layer attacks and has low operational overhead. correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家電子商務公司在屬於 AWS Organizations 中組織的 AWS 帳戶中執行應用程式。這些應用程式在所有帳戶的 Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫上運行。公司需要防止惡意活動，並且必須識別資料庫的異常失敗和不完整登入嘗試。哪一種解決方案能夠以最高效的方式滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company runs applications in AWS accounts that are part of an organization in AWS Organizations. The applications run on Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL databases across all the accounts. The company needs to prevent malicious activity and must identify abnormal failed and incomplete login attempts to the databases. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

A.zh: 將服務控制策略 (SCP) 附加到組織的根目錄以識別失敗的登入嘗試。
A.en: Attach service control policies (SCPs) to the root of the organization to identity the failed login attempts.

B.zh: 在 Amazon GuardDuty 中為組織的成員帳戶啟用 Amazon RDS 保護功能。
B.en: Enable the Amazon RDS Protection feature in Amazon GuardDuty for the member accounts of the organization.

C.zh: 將 Aurora 常規日誌發佈到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的日誌群組。將日誌資料匯出到中央 Amazon S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Publish the Aurora general logs to a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs. Export the log data to a central Amazon S3 bucket.

D.zh: 將 AWS CloudTrail 中的所有 Aurora PostgreSQL 資料庫事件發佈到中央 Amazon S3 儲存桶。
D.en: Publish all the Aurora PostgreSQL database events in AWS CloudTrail to a central Amazon S3 bucket.

A.zh: 錯誤。SCP 用於限制帳戶權限，不能直接用於監控和識別資料庫登入嘗試。分析：SCP的主要功能是控制組織內帳戶的權限，而不是分析和偵測安全事件。
A.en: Incorrect. SCPs are used to limit account permissions and cannot be directly used to monitor and identify database login attempts. Analysis: The main function of SCPs is to control the permissions of accounts within the organization, not to analyze and detect security incidents.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon GuardDuty 的 RDS 保護功能可自動偵測資料庫中的例外活動，包括失敗的登入嘗試。分析：這是營運效率最高的解決方案，因為它是一項託管服務，可以自動偵測和報告異常活動，而無需額外的日常管理或分析。
B.en: Correct. Amazon GuardDuty's RDS Protection feature can automatically detect anomalous activity in the database, including failed login attempts. Analytics: This is the most operationally efficient solution because it is a managed service that automatically detects and reports abnormal activity without the need for additional day-to-day management or analytics.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以透過極光分析登入宋朝測試，但需要手動設定匯出和分析，操作效率較低。分析：這種方法 Square Strip 需要額外的步驟來處理和分析 Richan 數據，Wu Strip 會自動偵測異常活動。
C.en: Incorrect. Although you can log in to the Song Dynasty test through Aurora analysis, you need to manually set up export and analysis, which makes the operation efficiency low. Analysis: this approach Square Strip requires additional steps to process and analyze Richan data, Wu Strip automatically detects abnormal activity.

D.zh: 錯誤。CloudTrail主要用於記錄API呼叫事件，而不是有關資料庫登入的詳細資訊。分析：雖然可以記錄一些與資料庫相關的事件，但如果沒有條目，則無法直接識別失敗的登入嘗試。
D.en: Incorrect. CloudTrail is primarily used to record API call events, not detailed information about database logins. Analysis: Although some database-related events can be recorded, failed login attempts cannot be directly identified without entries.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 Amazon GuardDuty 中為組織的成員帳戶啟用 Amazon RDS 保護功能。
answer_text.en: B. Enable the Amazon RDS Protection feature in Amazon GuardDuty for the member accounts of the organization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon GuardDuty 的 RDS 保護功能可自動偵測資料庫中的例外活動，包括失敗的登入嘗試。分析：這是營運效率最高的解決方案，因為它是一項託管服務，可以自動偵測和報告異常活動，而無需額外的日常管理或分析。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon GuardDuty's RDS Protection feature can automatically detect anomalous activity in the database, including failed login attempts. Analytics: This is the most operationally efficient solution because it is a managed service that automatically detects and reports abnormal activity without the need for additional day-to-day management or analytics.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有從其公司資料中心到 us-east-1 區域中的 VPC 的 AWS Direct Connect 連線。該公司最近收購了一家公司，該公司在其本地資料中心和 eu-west-2 區域之間擁有多個 VPC 和 Direct Connect 連線。公司和企業的VPC的CIDR區塊不重疊。該公司需要兩個區域和資料中心之間的連接。該公司需要一種可擴展的解決方案，同時減少營運開銷。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an AWS Direct Connect connection from its corporate data center to its VPC in the us-east-1 Region. The company recently acquired a corporation that has several VPCs and a Direct Connect connection between its on-premises data center and the eu-west-2 Region. The CIDR blocks for the VPCs of the company and the corporation do not overlap. The company requires connectivity between two Regions and the data centers. The company needs a solution that is scalable while reducing operational overhead. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 us-east-1 中的 VPC 和 eu-west-2 中的 VPC 之間設定區域間 VPC 對等互連。
A.en: Set up inter-Region VPC peering between the VPC in us-east-1 and the VPCs in eu-west-2.

B.zh: 建立從 us-east-1 中的 Direct Connect 連接到 eu-west-2 中的 VPC 的私有虛擬介面。
B.en: Create private virtual interfaces from the Direct Connect connection in us-east-1 to the VPCs in eu-west-2.

C.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 託管的全網狀 VPN 網路中建立 VPN 裝置。使用 AWS VPN CloudHub 在資料中心和每個 VPC 之間傳送和接收資料。
C.en: Establish VPN appliances in a fully meshed VPN network hosted by Amazon EC2. Use AWS VPN CloudHub to send and receive data between the data centers and each VPC.

D.zh: 將現有 Direct Connect 連線連接至 Direct Connect 閘道。將流量從每個區域中的 VPC 的虛擬私有閘道路由到 Direct Connect 閘道。
D.en: Connect the existing Direct Connect connection to a Direct Connect gateway. Route traffic from the virtual private gateways of the VPCs in each Region to the Direct Connect gateway.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：跨地域VPC對等可以實現VPC之間的通信，但需要手動設定每個對等連接，並且不支援直接連接本地資料中心。這種方法增加了運行開銷，不能滿足問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Cross-region VPC peering can enable communication between VPCs, but it requires manual setup of each peering connection and does not support direct connection to the local data center. This method increases operational overhead and does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：專線私有虛擬介面只能連接同地域的VPC，無法跨地域直接連接其他地理的VPC。因此，這種做法並不可行。
B.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Direct Connect's private virtual interface can only be connected to VPCs in the same region, and cannot be directly connected across regions to VPCs in other regions. Therefore, this approach is not feasible.

C.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：使用VPN CloudHub可以實現跨地域、跨資料中心的連接，但需要架設和維護一個EC2實例作為VPN設備。這種方法增加了營運費用，不符合問題中「減少營運費用」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Using VPN CloudHub can achieve cross-region and data center connections, but requires setting up and maintaining an EC2 instance as a VPN device. This method increases operating expenses and does not meet the "reduce operating expenses" requirement of the question.

D.zh: 正確。效能分析：直連網關支援跨地域連接，可將多個地域的VPC連接到本地資料中心，同時降低營運開銷並提供可擴充性。這個方法完全滿足題主的要求。
D.en: Correct. Performance analysis: Direct Connect Gateway supports cross-region connections, which can connect VPCs in multiple regions to local data centers while reducing operational overhead and providing scalability. This method fully meets the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: D. 將現有 Direct Connect 連線連接至 Direct Connect 閘道。將流量從每個區域中的 VPC 的虛擬私有閘道路由到 Direct Connect 閘道。
answer_text.en: D. Connect the existing Direct Connect connection to a Direct Connect gateway. Route traffic from the virtual private gateways of the VPCs in each Region to the Direct Connect gateway.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：直連網關支援跨地域連接，可將多個地域的VPC連接到本地資料中心，同時降低營運開銷並提供可擴充性。這個方法完全滿足題主的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: Direct Connect Gateway supports cross-region connections, which can connect VPCs in multiple regions to local data centers while reducing operational overhead and providing scalability. This method fully meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在開發一款手機遊戲，它將分數更新傳輸到後端處理器，然後將結果發佈在排行榜上。解決方案架構師需要設計一個解決方案，能夠處理大流量峰值、按接收順序處理行動遊戲更新，並將處理後的更新儲存在高度可用的資料庫中。該公司還希望最大限度地減少維護解決方案所需的管理開銷。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is developing a mobile game that streams score updates to a backend processor and then posts results on a leaderboard. A solutions architect needs to design a solution that can handle large traffic spikes, process the mobile game updates in order of receipt, and store the processed updates in a highly available database. The company also wants to minimize the management overhead required to maintain the solution. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將分數更新推送到 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams。使用 AWS Lambda 處理 Kinesis Data Streams 中的更新。將處理後的更新儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。
A.en: Push score updates to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams. Process the updates in Kinesis Data Streams with AWS Lambda. Store the processed updates in Amazon DynamoDB.

B.zh: 將分數更新推送到 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams。使用為 Auto Scaling 設定的一組 Amazon EC2 執行個體處理更新。將處理後的更新儲存在 Amazon Redshift 中。
B.en: Push score updates to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams. Process the updates with a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances set up for Auto Scaling. Store the processed updates in Amazon Redshift.

C.zh: 將分數更新推送到 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題。將 AWS Lambda 函數訂閱到 SNS 主題以處理更新。將處理後的更新儲存在 Amazon EC2 上執行的 SQL 資料庫中。
C.en: Push score updates to an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe an AWS Lambda function to the SNS topic to process the updates. Store the processed updates in a SQL database running on Amazon EC2.

D.zh: 將分數更新推送到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。使用具有 Auto Scaling 功能的 Amazon EC2 執行個體佇列來處理 SQS 佇列中的更新。將處理後的更新儲存在 Amazon RDS 多可用區資料庫執行個體中。
D.en: Push score updates to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances with Auto Scaling to process the updates in the SQS queue. Store the processed updates in an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance.

A.zh: 正確。Kinesis Data Streams可以處理大流量資料並保證順序處理，滿足問題的要求。正確：AWS Lambda 可以無伺服器處理數據，從而減少管理開銷。正確：Amazon DynamoDB 是一個廣泛使用的資料庫，管理開銷較低，並且符合問題要求。
A.en: Correct. Kinesis Data Streams can handle large traffic data and ensure sequential processing, which meets the requirements of the question. Correct: AWS Lambda can process data serverlessly, reducing management overhead. Correct: Amazon DynamoDB is a widely available database with low management overhead and meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。Kinesis Data Streams 可以處理大流量資料並確保順序處理。錯誤：使用 EC2 執行個體需要額外的管理開銷，這不符合問題的「最小化管理開銷」要求。錯誤：Amazon Redshift 是一個資料倉庫，適合分析資料存儲，但不適合即時更新的遊戲得分存儲。
B.en: Incorrect. Kinesis Data Streams can handle large traffic data and ensure sequential processing. Error: Using EC2 instances requires additional management overhead, which does not meet the "minimize management overhead" requirement of the question. Error: Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse, suitable for analytical data storage, but not suitable for real-time updated game score storage.

C.zh: 錯誤。SNS是發布/訂閱服務，無法保證訊息的順序處理，不符合問題的要求。正確：AWS Lambda 可以處理數據，但 SNS 的排序問題使其不適合此場景。錯誤：在 EC2 上執行 SQL 資料庫需要額外的管理開銷，這不符合問題的「最小化管理開銷」要求。
C.en: Incorrect. SNS is a publishing/subscription service and cannot guarantee the sequential processing of messages, which does not meet the requirements of the question. Correct: AWS Lambda can process data, but SNS's sequencing issues make it unsuitable for this scenario. Error: Running the SQL database on EC2 requires additional management overhead, which does not meet the "minimize management overhead" requirement of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。SQS可以保證訊息的順序處理。錯誤：使用 EC2 執行個體需要額外的管理開銷，這不符合問題的「最小化管理開銷」要求。正確：Amazon RDS 多可用區資料庫執行個體可供資料庫使用，但管理開銷高於 DynamoDB。
D.en: Incorrect. SQS can guarantee the sequential processing of messages. Error: Using EC2 instances requires additional management overhead, which does not meet the "minimize management overhead" requirement of the question. Correct: Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instances are available for database use, but the management overhead is higher than DynamoDB.
